extension.description: Chat sidebar connected to your local OpenCode (agents, skills, MCP)
command.addFileToContext: OpenCode: Add current file to context
command.addOpenFilesToContext: OpenCode: Add open files to context
command.addGitContext: OpenCode: Add Git information to context
config.serverUrl.desc: OpenCode server URL (opencode serve or TUI running).
config.serverPort.desc: Port used when starting the server automatically.
config.serverUsername.desc: HTTP Basic Auth user (if OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD is set).
config.serverPassword.desc: HTTP Basic Auth password for OpenCode server.
config.autoStartServer.desc: Automatically run `opencode serve` if no server is found.
config.defaultAgent.desc: Default OpenCode agent name (empty = OpenCode config).
config.autoApprovePermissions.desc: Automatically approve permissions (bash, file edits, etc.).
config.bin.desc: Path to opencode executable (empty = auto in Windows/npm). Equivalents to OPENCODE_BIN.
config.quickActions.desc: Custom quick actions in the welcome screen.
view.title: Chat
view.container.title: OpenCode
